name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate cash flow forecasts cause financial mismanagement. We automate daily cash flow forecasts instead of manual cash flow tracking using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate cash flow forecasts lead to financial mismanagement.
features: user-friendly dashboard for cash flow overview
